title: microlepia obtusiloba
intro: Microlepia obtusiloba is a species of fern, specifically a type of lycopodioid fern native to Southeast Asia, particularly in countries such as China, India, and Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Microlepia obtusiloba include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to help alleviate water retention. Traditionally, Microlepia obtusiloba has been prepared as a herbal tea or powder for consumption, and it is also used in some traditional medicine practices as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
